name: devforge
description: Personal Project Command Center — manage all your side projects from Claude Code
author: xmqywx

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize DevForge: create DB, register MCP, scan git repos

commands.name: issues
commands.description: List open issues for current project

commands.name: add-issue
commands.description: Add an issue to current project

commands.name: note
commands.description: Add a note to current project

commands.name: summary
commands.description: Generate session summary and update project
